summary: A recorded clip, posted by the account, of an outdoor White House event. A man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and red tie speaks at a lectern bearing the presidential seal in front of an arched portico. A woman in a pale suit and wide-brimmed straw hat is seated at left and a gray-haired man in a gray suit is seated at right. A Marine in dress uniform stands in the background. The framing holds a single wide shot across the sampled frames.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern with the presidential seal before an arched portico; a woman in a straw hat is seated at left and a man in a gray suit at right.
The same wide shot of the speaker at the lectern continues with the seated guests.

notable_text: SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
